name: Mexican Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the water or oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Cook the onion for 10 minutes. Add the green pepper, corn, green chilies, tomato sauce, chili powder, and salt and pepper; cook for 5 minutes.
3. Add the mashed beans and cook for an additional 10 minutes over low heat. Remove from the heat and set aside.
4. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
5. In a large saucepan, combine the cornmeal, flour, baking powder, and water. Cook over medium heat until the mixture thickens, stirring constantly with a wire whisk to prevent lumps in the cornmeal.
6. Spread half of the cornmeal mixture evenly on the bottom of a nonstick baking dish.
7. Spread the bean mixture evenly over the cornmeal layer.
8. Add the remaining cornmeal mixture on top, spreading it to cover the beans.
9. Bake for 45 minutes or until the cornbread is golden brown.
Preparation time: 45 minutes
Baking time: 45 minutes
